zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth De Montfort於大約1273年出生在英國瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特時，她的父親Sir Peter de Montfort35歲，母親Matilda De Le Warre32歲。她於大約1292年與William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1354年8月在英國奧可福爾奧可福德克里斯蒂 邱奇 凱德拉爾享年82歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾奧可福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth De Montfort于大约1273年出生在英国瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特时，她的父亲Sir Peter de Montfort35岁，母亲Matilda De Le Warre32岁。她于大约1292年与William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1354年8月在英国奧可福爾奧可福德克里斯蒂 邱奇 凱德拉爾享年82岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾奧可福德。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth De Montfort was born about 1273, in Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England, her father, Sir Peter de Montfort, was 35 and her mother, Matilda De Le Warre, was 32. She married William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu about 1292. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. She died in August 1354, in Christ Church Cathedral, Oxford, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 82, and was buried in Oxford, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth De Montfort est née environ 1273, à Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Peter de Montfort, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Matilda De Le Warre, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu environ 1292. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en août 1354, à Christ Church Cathedral, Oxford, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterrée à Oxford, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth De Montfort um 1273 in Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Peter de Montfort 35 und ihre Mutter Matilda De Le Warre 32. Sie hat um 1292 William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 8 Töchter. it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth De Montfort è nata il circa 1273 nel Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Sir Peter de Montfort, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Matilda De Le Warre, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu circa 1292. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel agosto 1354, nel Christ Church Cathedral, Oxford, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolta a Oxford, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth De Montfortが約1273年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアビーウデセルトで生まれた時，父Sir Peter de Montfortは35歳，母Matilda De Le Warreは32歳であった。約1292年にWilliam Montagu 2nd Baron Montaguと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1354年8月にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアオクスフォードチリスト チャーチ カスエドラルで82歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアオクスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.St Frideswide, Christ Church Cathedral,: 영국 스퍼드실르 스퍼드 크리스트 처르치 캐테드럴
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth De Montfort(이)가 대략 1273년 영국 워윅실르 보데세르트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Peter de Montfort(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda De Le Warre(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1292년 William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1354년 8월 영국 스퍼드실르 스퍼드 크리스트 처르치 캐테드럴에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 스퍼드에 묻혔다.

ru.St Frideswide, Christ Church Cathedral,: краист чурч кэтедраль, оксфорд, оксфордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth De Montfort родилась около 1273 г. в местности бодесирт, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Peter de Montfort было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda De Le Warre, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu около 1292 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла август 1354 г. в местности краист чурч кэтедраль, оксфорд, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 82 лет и была похоронена в местности оксфорд, оксфордшир, Англия.

es.St Frideswide, Christ Church Cathedral,: Christ Church Cathedral, Oxford, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth De Montfort nació aproximadamente 1273, en Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Peter de Montfort, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Matilda De Le Warre, tenía 32 años. Se casó con William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu aproximadamente 1292. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en agosto de 1354, en Christ Church Cathedral, Oxford, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultada en Oxford, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
